content: Curiosity-driven autonomous agents can leverage step-wise Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to stabilize reinforcement learning updates for intrinsic curiosity rewards, eliminating the unstable reward scaling that plagues traditional ICM and RND curiosity mechanisms. This modified step-wise GRPO objective would partition the agent's memory buffer into sequential, within-trajectory groups to normalize intrinsic reward signals at each exploration step, rather than across the entire replay buffer.
